meta.siteName: American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research
meta.description: A licensed educational and training institute offering locally and internationally accredited programs in tourism, hospitality, engineering, quality, and leadership.

footer.bio: The American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research is a licensed entity dedicated to developing human resources through locally and internationally accredited programs that meet labour market needs and support sustainable development.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get updates on new programmes, events, and research publications.

home.heroSubtitle: Develop and qualify your career through internationally accredited programmes in tourism, hospitality, engineering, quality management, and administrative leadership.
home.whySubtitle: A licensed institution with internationally accredited programmes built for real labour market needs and sustainable professional development.
home.whyFeature1Desc: Nationally licensed and internationally accredited — our programmes meet the highest quality standards verified by independent bodies.
home.whyFeature2Desc: Every programme is designed for immediate practical application, bridging theory and real-world professional demands.
home.whyFeature3Desc: Our faculty are practising industry professionals — engineers, hotel directors, quality auditors, and tourism experts.
home.whyFeature4Desc: Over 50 programmes spanning Applied Diplomas, Short Courses, E-Learning, Leadership, and Engineering & Maintenance tracks.
home.whyFeature5Desc: Dedicated post-training support, career services, and lifelong access to our curated professional learning resources.
home.programsSubtitle: A selection from our comprehensive catalogue — each programme designed to deliver measurable impact from day one.
home.accreditationsSubtitle: Recognised by leading national and international accreditation bodies.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real outcomes from professionals who advanced their careers through our programmes.
home.newsSubtitle: Stay informed on new programme launches, accreditation milestones, and institute announcements.

about.title: About the Institute
about.subtitle: The American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research — a licensed institution committed to developing human resources across all applied education and training fields.
about.visionText: To be the regional centre of excellence for applied education and professional training in tourism, hospitality, engineering, and administrative leadership — qualifying graduates who drive sustainable development.
about.missionText: To develop and qualify human resources in all fields of applied education and training through locally and internationally accredited programmes that meet labour market needs and support sustainable development.
about.valuesText: Quality, integrity, innovation, and continuous improvement guide every programme we design and every professional we develop.
about.value1Desc: Applying the highest international quality standards with certified systems that are continuously reviewed and updated.
about.value2Desc: Programmes anchored in practical, real-world application — delivering immediate, measurable impact in every workplace.
about.value3Desc: Ethical, transparent practices across all academic, training, and institutional operations.
about.value4Desc: Contributing to national and regional sustainable development by raising the quality and capability of the workforce.
about.storyP1: The American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research was established to meet the growing need for specialised, applied professional training in Egypt and the broader region. We are a licensed educational and training institution that brings together practical expertise across tourism, hospitality, engineering, quality management, and administrative leadership.
about.storyP2: Through our comprehensive programme portfolio — including Applied Diplomas, Short Courses, E-Learning, Leadership, and Engineering & Maintenance programmes — we have qualified thousands of professionals across public and private sector organisations. Our internationally accredited qualifications are trusted by leading employers across the tourism, hospitality, and industrial sectors.
about.objectivesSubtitle: Six strategic objectives that drive everything we do at AI AETAR.
about.obj1Desc: Develop the skills and competencies of human resources across tourism, hospitality, and engineering sectors.
about.obj2Desc: Provide specialised training programmes that are continuously updated to meet evolving labour market needs.
about.obj3Desc: Support digital transformation, innovation, and quality culture in professional training and development.
about.obj4Desc: Empower administrative and technical leadership to drive organisational performance and excellence.
about.obj5Desc: Contribute to sustainable development and raise the standard of services across the tourism and hospitality sectors.
about.obj6Desc: Strengthen local and international partnerships in applied education and professional training.
about.teamSubtitle: Practising industry professionals and subject-matter experts united by a commitment to applied, transformative education.
about.qualitySubtitle: Our commitment to quality is embedded in every programme we deliver.
about.q1Desc: Applying the highest international quality standards across all programmes and operations.
about.q2Desc: Certified by national and international accreditation bodies.
about.q3Desc: Integrated system for continuous performance monitoring and evaluation.
about.q4Desc: Nationally and internationally recognised certificates and qualifications.
about.q5Desc: Programmes continuously updated in line with market needs and quality standards.

programs.title: Academic & Professional Programs
programs.subtitle: Over 50 accredited programmes across Applied Diplomas, Short Courses, E-Learning, Leadership, and Engineering & Maintenance tracks.

certifications.title: Certifications & Accreditations
certifications.subtitle: Our programmes meet the highest national and international quality standards — verified and certified by independent accreditation bodies.
certifications.description: International quality management certification confirming our institute meets rigorous standards for educational delivery, assessment, and continuous improvement.

certItems.name: ISO 9001:2015 QMS
certItems.text: Quality Management System certification verifying our institute meets ISO 9001:2015 standards for educational design, delivery, and continuous improvement across all programmes.

certItems.name: National Standards Recognition
certItems.text: National quality recognition certifying compliance with Egyptian standards for professional and vocational education and training delivery.

certItems.name: Quality Institute Excellence Award
certItems.text: Excellence award recognising our contribution to raising professional training quality standards across tourism, hospitality, and engineering sectors nationally.

certItems.name: Integrated Management System
certItems.text: Integrated management certification validating our institute's quality, environmental, health, and safety frameworks to international multi-standard requirements.

resources.title: Resources & Publications
resources.subtitle: Free access to research briefs, practical toolkits, and professional development content for tourism and technical professionals.

en.title: Tourism & Hospitality Competency Framework 2026
en.excerpt: A practical framework mapping 32 core competencies for hospitality, tourism, engineering, and quality professionals — aligned with international standards.

ar.title: إطار كفاءات السياحة والضيافة 2026
ar.excerpt: إطار عملي يحدد 32 كفاءة جوهرية للمهنيين في الضيافة والسياحة والهندسة والجودة — متوافق مع المعايير الدولية.

en.title: Applied Diploma vs Short Course: Which Path is Right for You?
en.excerpt: A practical guide comparing Applied Diplomas and Short Courses — helping professionals choose the right programme for their career stage and goals.

ar.title: الدبلوم التطبيقي أم الدورة القصيرة: أيهما يناسبك؟
ar.excerpt: دليل عملي يقارن بين الدبلومات التطبيقية والدورات القصيرة — لمساعدة المهنيين على اختيار البرنامج المناسب لمرحلتهم المهنية.

en.title: Masterclass: Hotel Engineering & Maintenance Management
en.excerpt: A 90-minute masterclass covering MEP systems, BMS, low current infrastructure, and preventive maintenance strategy for hotel engineering teams.

ar.title: ماستركلاس: هندسة الفنادق وإدارة الصيانة
ar.excerpt: ماستركلاس 90 دقيقة يغطي أنظمة MEP والBMS والبنية التحتية للتيار الخفيف واستراتيجية الصيانة الوقائية لفرق هندسة الفنادق.

en.title: ISO 9001 Internal Audit Checklist — Tourism & Training Edition
en.excerpt: A ready-to-use 72-point audit checklist aligned with ISO 9001:2015 requirements for tourism institutes and training organisations.

ar.title: قائمة تدقيق داخلي ISO 9001 — نسخة السياحة والتدريب
ar.excerpt: قائمة تدقيق جاهزة من 72 نقطة متوافقة مع متطلبات ISO 9001:2015 للمعاهد السياحية ومنظمات التدريب.

en.title: Low Current Systems in Hotels: A Technical Overview
en.excerpt: Comprehensive overview of fire alarm, CCTV, access control, and network infrastructure design and management in modern hotel buildings.

ar.title: أنظمة التيار الخفيف في الفنادق: نظرة تقنية شاملة
ar.excerpt: نظرة شاملة على تصميم وإدارة أنظمة الإنذار من الحريق والمراقبة والتحكم في الوصول والشبكات في المباني الفندقية الحديثة.

en.title: Webinar: Leadership Excellence in Tourism & Hospitality
en.excerpt: Expert panel on strategic leadership, change management, and building high-performance teams in tourism and hospitality organisations.

ar.title: ندوة إلكترونية: التميز القيادي في السياحة والضيافة
ar.excerpt: نقاش مع خبراء حول القيادة الاستراتيجية وإدارة التغيير وبناء فرق عالية الأداء في منظمات السياحة والضيافة.
